🇨🇳 China Market · Effective July 2026

Rwanda Premium Coffee
Export to China

Premium Rwanda A1 & A2 grade Arabica coffee. Tariff-free entry into China from July 20, 2026. Rainforest Alliance certified. CIF Shanghai pricing.

Rainforest Alliance Certified
Direct Trade Origin
Zero Tariff — China 2026
Min. Order 1 MT
0%
China Import Tariff
53
African Countries Eligible
Jul 20
Policy Effective Date
1 MT
Minimum Order (CIF)
Why Rwanda Coffee

The World's Most Story-Rich
Arabica Origin

Rainforest Alliance

Full RA certification across all supply chain stages. The single most important credential for EU and now China premium buyers.

Geographic Identity

Rwanda's high-altitude volcanic soils produce a distinct Arabica profile — bright acidity, floral aromatics, clean finish — prized by specialty roasters globally.

Traceable Supply Chain

End-to-end lot traceability from washing station to port. Full documentation package: phytosanitary certificates, COO, bill of lading, insurance.

China-Africa Trade Policy

Historic Market Opening

From July 20, 2026, China opens coffee imports to all 53 African countries under a unified phytosanitary system. Rwanda qualifies immediately. This is the window — act before competitors lock in supply agreements.

0% Import Tariff
May 2026 onward

Available Lots

Grade Process Altitude Score MOQ Certification

Rwanda Premium
Bourbon varietal, single washing station		 Natural 1,900–2,200m 87+ 500 kg Rainforest Alliance Direct Trade
Pricing & Incoterms

CIF Shanghai — All-In Delivered Cost

Rwanda A1 — Washed

CIF Shanghai · per MT
$4,800 – $5,400
Price varies by lot, season, and volume. FOB Djibouti reference.
  • Marine freight Kigali → Djibouti (port)
  • Sea freight Djibouti → Shanghai
  • Port handling & clearance at Shanghai
  • Phytosanitary certificate included
  • COO (Certificate of Origin) included
  • Marine cargo insurance included
Most Popular for China Importers

Rwanda A2 — Washed

CIF Shanghai · per MT
$4,200 – $4,700
Strong value-to-quality ratio. Ideal for mid-scale roasters & café chains.
  • All-inclusive CIF Shanghai pricing
  • Full Rainforest Alliance documentation
  • Dedicated lot reservation
  • Quality inspection on request
  • SGS pre-shipment cupping available
  • Lead time: 5–7 weeks from order confirmation
Supply Chain

From Rwanda Hills to Shanghai Port
in 5–7 Weeks

1

Order Confirmed

MOQ 1 MT. Order confirmed and lot reserved. Proforma invoice issued.

2

Quality Check

SGS or local agent pre-shipment cupping. Sample approval before loading.

3

Kigali → Djibouti

Ground freight from washing station to Djibouti port. Typically 5–7 days.

4

Djibouti → Shanghai

Sea freight approx. 21 days. Port clearance, duty (0%), delivery to buyer warehouse.

We supply roasters, importers, and distributors across Asia. Contact us for a formal quote, sample request, or to discuss a supply agreement.
